      fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm).uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime
      (fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).norm) (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) (uniformIntegrable_iff_norm.mp h)
  · intro T
    obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := T.2.2
    exact ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le hm T.2.1 ht).mono (𝓕.le' t)).aestronglyMeasurable

by
  have h_prog := hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2
  have h_stopped τ : AEStronglyMeasurable (stoppedValue X τ.1) P :=
    ((stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le h_prog τ.2.1 τ.2.2).mono (𝓕.le' (WithTop.untopA τ.1))).aestronglyMeasurable
  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
  have hY_sub : Submartingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.submartingale_convex_comp
    (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
  have hY_rc : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).norm
  constructor
  · intro h
    rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).aestronglyMeasurable)]
    exact (Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_sub hY_rc (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _)).mp
      ⟨h_prog.norm, h.uniformIntegrable.norm⟩
  · intro h
    refine ⟨h_prog, (uniformIntegrable_iff_norm h_stopped).mpr ?_⟩
    exact ((Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_sub hY_rc (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _)).mpr
      h.norm).uniformIntegrable

by
  let Y := fun t ω ↦ ‖X t ω‖
  have hY_sub : Submartingale Y 𝓕 P := hX1.submartingale_convex_comp
    (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)
  have hY_cont : ∀ ω, RightContinuous (Y · ω) := fun ω ↦ (hX2 ω).norm
  have hY_nonneg : 0 ≤ Y := fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _
  have h_iff := Submartingale.classD_iff_uniformIntegrable hY_sub hY_cont hY_nonneg
  have h_prog := hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2
  have hX_ae (τ : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤}) : AEStronglyMeasurable (stoppedValue X τ.1) P :=
    h_prog.stoppedValue τ.2.1
  rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm hX1.adapted.aestronglyMeasurable, ← h_iff]
  exact ⟨fun h ↦ ⟨h.progMeasurable.norm, (uniformIntegrable_iff_norm hX_ae).1 h.uniformIntegrable⟩,
    fun h ↦ ⟨h_prog, (uniformIntegrable_iff_norm hX_ae).2 h.uniformIntegrable⟩⟩

by
  have hX_prog := hX1.adapted.progMeasurable_of_rightContinuous hX2
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · let f (t : ι) : {T | IsStoppingTime 𝓕 T ∧ ∀ ω, T ω ≠ ⊤} :=
      ⟨fun _ ↦ t, isStoppingTime_const 𝓕 t, fun _ ↦ WithTop.coe_ne_top t⟩
    simpa [stoppedValue, (· ∘ ·)] using h.uniformIntegrable.comp f
  · refine classD_of_uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime ?_ hX_prog
    rw [uniformIntegrable_iff_norm]
    · refine (hX1.submartingale_convex_comp (convexOn_norm convex_univ) continuous_norm
        (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).norm)).uniformIntegrable_bounded_stoppingTime
        (fun ω t ↦ (hX2 ω t).norm) (fun _ _ ↦ norm_nonneg _) ?_
      rwa [← uniformIntegrable_iff_norm (by simp) (by simp)
        (fun t ↦ (hX1.integrable t).aestronglyMeasurable)]
    · intro τ; obtain ⟨t, ht⟩ := τ.2.2
      exact (stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue_of_le hX_prog τ.2.1 ht).aestronglyMeasurable
